bead.title: S15-5: Execute-loop wake-on-approve + origin_operator_prompt_id backlinks
bead.description: On operatorPromptSubmit (auto-approve) or operatorPromptApprove, signal local execute-loop coordinator to claim immediately. During execution, every bead created/changed and every artifact written by the operator-prompt bead's harness gets an origin_operator_prompt_id event/back-link recorded. See /tmp/story-15-final.md §Implementation #2 (signal) and §Additional security controls bullet 6.
bead.acceptance: Execute-loop wakes on approve event without waiting for next tick; e2e: submit prompt with sentinel-writing harness → bead lands change in worktree → bead-event records diff; affected beads carry origin_operator_prompt_id event referencing originator; concurrency test: two operator prompts mutating same bead exercises land-coordinator conflict path with no silent corruption.
